name: Домен Света
description: Gods of light—including {@deity Helm}, {@deity Lathander}, {@deity Pholtus}, {@deity Branchala}, the Silver Flame, {@deity Belenus}, {@deity Apollo}, and {@deity Re-Horakhty}—promote the ideals of rebirth and renewal, truth, vigilance, and beauty, often using the symbol of the sun. Some of these gods are portrayed as the sun itself or as a charioteer who guides the sun across the sky. Others are tireless sentinels whose eyes pierce every shadow and see through every deception. Some are deities of beauty and artistry, who teach that art is a vehicle for the soul's improvement.
shortDescription: Bearer of Light and Fire Against Darkness

features.name: Light Domain Spells
features.description: Your connection to this divine domain ensures you always have certain spells ready. When you reach a Cleric level specified in the Light Domain Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

features.name: Warding Flare
features.description: When a creature that you can see within 30 feet of yourself makes an attack roll, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to impose {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the attack roll, causing light to flare before it hits or misses. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once). You regain all expended uses when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

features.name: Radiance of the Dawn
features.description: As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, you can expend a use of your Channel Divinity and present your {@item Holy Symbol|XPHB} to emit sunlight in a 30-foot-radius {@variantrule Emanation|XPHB} originating from yourself. Each creature of your choice in that area must make a Constitution saving throw, taking Radiant damage equal to {@dice 2d10} plus your Cleric level on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. In addition, {@variantrule Magical Darkness|XPHB} in that area is dispelled.

features.name: Improved Warding Flare
features.description: You can also use your Warding Flare feature when a creature that you can see within 30 feet of you attacks a creature other than you.

features.name: Corona of Light
features.description: As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, you conjure a luminous aura that radiates from you in a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation|XPHB}. The aura lasts for 1 minute or until you dismiss it (no action required). While the aura is active, you shed {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in the area, and each creature of your choice in the area when the aura activates or that enters the area on a later turn must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or have the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the aura ends.
